code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut total = 0
mut cur = 0
mut sign = 1
mut in_num = false
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)

while i <= n
  let b = if i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      32
    end
  else
    32
  end

  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if in_num
      let v = cur * sign
      if v > 0
        total = total + v * 2
      end
    end
    cur = 0
    sign = 1
    in_num = false
  else if b == 45 and not in_num
    sign = -1
    in_num = true
  else if b == 43 and not in_num
    sign = 1
    in_num = true
  else if b >= 48 and b <= 57
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    in_num = true
  end

  i = i + 1
end

print("result=#{total}")
